
user@host /tmp % codex
> You are in /private/tmp

  Do you trust the contents of this directory? Working with untrusted contents comes with higher risk of prompt injection. Trusting the directory allows project-local config, hooks, and exec policies
  to load.

› 1. Yes, continue
  2. No, quit

  Press enter to continue

  Tip: New For a limited time, Codex is included in your plan for free – let’s build together.


› In exactly 3 short bullet points, what is tmux?


• - tmux is a terminal multiplexer.
  - It lets you run multiple shell sessions inside one terminal window.
  - Sessions keep running after you disconnect, so you can reattach later.


› Summarize recent commits

  gpt-5.5 medium · /private/tmp
